violations.description: STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Unwrapped utensils noted being offered in such a way that the lip or food portion must be touched to obtain the utensil. Observed spatchulas and portion scoops being stored with the food contact end facing outward rather than the handle outward.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Water and drain lines above the coffee bar is beginning to have debris build up forming.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Unwrapped utensils noted being offered in such a way that the lip or food portion must be touched to obtain the utensil. Observed spatchulas and portion scoops being stored with the food contact end facing outward rather than the handle outward.
